hyperedges.label: Regulatory RAG Ingest Pipeline: Source → Parser (federal/PA/eCFR) → Chunker → Embedder → regulatory_chunks
EIS Ingest Pipeline: Upload → evaluation_ingest → parse/chunk/embed → evaluation_chunks
Per-Agent Cost Tracking Flow (LLMResult -> pricing.py -> agent_cost SSE -> cost chips)
Chunks Inspector UI Pattern (source listing, paginated chunks, collapsible rows)
Regulatory/EIS Ingest Pipeline Pattern (parse, chunk, embed, upsert, status tracking)
EIA 5-Agent Pipeline: Project Parser → Env Data → Regulatory Screening → Impact Analysis → Report Synthesis
5 Agent Output Tables linked to projects table via FK
Agent Output Persistence: Spec → Plan → DB Tables → API Endpoints
Regulatory Source Documents: PA Ch.105 + NEPA 40 CFR 1500-1508 → regulatory_sources → regulatory_chunks
EIS Ingest Pipeline: Upload → evaluations → embedding → evaluation_chunks → scoring

hyperedges.label: Regulatory RAG Ingest Pipeline: Source → Parser (federal/PA/eCFR) → Chunker → Embedder → regulatory_chunks
EIS Ingest Pipeline: Upload → evaluation_ingest → parse/chunk/embed → evaluation_chunks
Per-Agent Cost Tracking Flow (LLMResult -> pricing.py -> agent_cost SSE -> cost chips)
Chunks Inspector UI Pattern (source listing, paginated chunks, collapsible rows)
Regulatory/EIS Ingest Pipeline Pattern (parse, chunk, embed, upsert, status tracking)
EIA 5-Agent Pipeline: Project Parser → Env Data → Regulatory Screening → Impact Analysis → Report Synthesis
5 Agent Output Tables linked to projects table via FK
Agent Output Persistence: Spec → Plan → DB Tables → API Endpoints
Regulatory Source Documents: PA Ch.105 + NEPA 40 CFR 1500-1508 → regulatory_sources → regulatory_chunks
EIS Ingest Pipeline: Upload → evaluations → embedding → evaluation_chunks → scoring
